titleStmt.title: SII 15.117: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 117. (B.K. No. 208 of 1926-27.) NIḌGUNDI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Nārāyaṇadēva temple.

This is dated Śaka 1094, the 5th regnal year of the king, Khara, Pushya ba. 13, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1171 A.D., December 28. The weekday, however, was Sunday. The Śaka year cited was current.

It gives a short account of the Sinda rulers and records the renewal of the grant of the village Kaḷḷavanahaḷḷi to the god Traipurusha of the agrahāra Niḍugundi by the Sinda queen Śrīyādēvī and her two sons Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Kumāra Bijjaṇa and Kumāra Vikramarasa for the prosperity of the family. A copper plate charter is also stated to have been issued in this connection.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī jayaścābhyudayaśca . śrī traipuruṣadēvāya namaḥ . śrī gaṇapatidēvāya namaḥ . śrī svāmi kā¨rttikadēvāya namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracārave traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . Utpaḷamāle . śrī vadhutuṁ vṛttaku maṇḍaḷadiṁde ma
kaḷpāvanījavadoṁdesava taṇneḷaraṁ geḍegoṁḍaṁ dēvakāṁtāvana nolirisi pālgaḍaloḷaṁ nalasida viṣṇu lakṣmi nakke kuḍuge mā ya biṭṭanabhīṣṭasiddhiyaṁ . mattēbhavikrīḍitaṁ . jaḷamuṁ śītaḷamuṁ tatatiyuṁ saurabhyamuṁ ratnamaṁḍalamuṁ kāntiyumippa
vōlupa muṁdanūpā ḷābaḷaminēkksaṇō lvena laṁpiṁ kūḍidaḷu viśvamaṁṇḍaḷadoḷu taḷtiraṁ satataṁ śrī sallīleyiṁ bina . Antenisidārāṇīmukha maṇḍaḷika makuṭacūḍā maṇiyenisidā cāmaṁḍabhūpāḷakaṁ © śā¨rddoḷavikrīḍitaṁ . śrī matsiṁdakuḷā
bbabhānuvanitālāvaṇya puḻpāstranuddāmārāti madēbhakēsarinṛpāḷaṁ bijjaṇō¨rvvī śvaraṁ cāmuṁḍaṁ nṛpanātanagrama śrīdēvigaṁ puṭṭidaṁ ddāma śrī vikramāṁkaṁ nṛpaṁ . mattēbhavikrīḍitaṁ . sasiyuṁ kaustubhamuṁ podaḷdū
gedavolu vārāsiyoḷaṁ koḍe santōsadiṁ petta basu paṭṭamanalaṁ kaṭṭaluṁ kūḍe haḷasalu maṁtrisuhṛtsamastabaḷamaṁ siṁdānvaya¨rppuṭṭe sadaṁ bijjaṇadēvanu padapiṁ śrī vikramādityanu . mattēbhavikrīḍita . gurudēvadvija pūjeyiṁ parahitabyāpāradiṁ
vēdabaṁdhuraśāstrā¨rttha vicāradiṁ sakaḷa tatvācāradiṁ pottanādaripa¨rnni¨rmmaḷa citta rujvaḷayaśa¨rnnālnū¨rvvaru¨rvvīnuta¨rddhareyoḷu śrī niḍuṁguṇḍiyoḷu negaḷva ¨rvvipra vidyādhararu . © svasti śrīmatu sakava¨rṣada 1094 neya śrīma tkaḷacu¨ryya cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri bhujabaḷamalla
sōvidēvava¨rṣada 5 neya karasaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 13 sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti yaṁdu liya haḷḷiya baḷi yalu śrī kriṣṇaveṇnānadiya śrī madanādiyagrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya śrī traipuruṣarāḷkeya kaḷḷavana
haḷḷiyanā dēvarige pū¨rvvada luḷḷa hiriya śilāśāsana ma¨ryyādeyale yāva bādheyaṁ pūṇdu naḍasihaveṁdu śrīmatpiriyarasi paṭṭamahādēvi śriyādēviyarasiyaru śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ piriya kumāraṁ bijjaṇa dēvarasanuṁ Avarahaḷiyiṁ kumāThe letter da is written below the line in smaller siśe.
raṁ vikramadēvarasenuṁ samasta parivārasahitavāhaḷḷige tāṁbraśāsanavaṁ koṭṭiheveṁdu dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍuvalli yīhaḷḷi pū¨rvvadalutamma mātāmaharādevarige māḍi koṭṭa haḷḷiyale yidakkāva bādheyaṁ māḍuvudillendu tāṁbra śāsana
vaṁ kuḍuvaṁ tavage tāve bhakti huṭṭi vaṁśābhivṛddhiyuṁ rājyābhivṛddhiyuvappaṁtāgiThe record stops here abruptly;
Digital edition of SII 15.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
